title: Laricorchis fulgens
taxonomy: Laricorchis fulgens is classified as a species within the family Orchidaceae. This family is commonly known as the orchid family and consists of over 30,000 known species. As a member of this family, Laricorchis fulgens is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the kingdom Plantae. It is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Coelogyneae. This classification places Laricorchis fulgens within the broader group of orchids.
